manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v59

- You can now cancel sending a video or a photo in a chat without waiting for it to be posted.
- Added an uploading progress indicator on media that are being sent.
- Redesigned the voice message UI.
- You can now add funny effects to your voice chats (I'm in LOVE with them!)
- Redesigned the previews when you hold them in the Direct gallery picker. There's also a new menu where you can favourite or delete the media (the favourites can be accessed from a new category that will show if you press the Recents text).
- Minor changes.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
